title: ItzReal13's All in One
description: This modpack is for pvp and survival
body: This modpack is made by ItzReal13. This modpack includes all needed things for pvp, best for Tank, best for Crystal PVP, best for any other pvp gamemodes. It includes Flash Crystal Optimizer for faster crystals. Inventory Hud+ for seeing your inventory in game. ViaFabricPlus for joining every server with every version. Zoomify for zoom. A lot of performance mods. Vanilla 100 FPS, this modpack is 500 FPS. And so much other QoL feature mods. Feel free to feedback. brunchpvp@gmail.com
